name: Whole Wheat Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the egg and melted shortening.
2. Add milk to the egg mixture and stir until combined.
3. In another bowl, sift together the sugar, salt, and baking powder with the whole wheat flour.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until smooth.
5. Heat a griddle or large skillet over medium heat.
6. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the hot griddle for each cake.
7. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and the edges are set, about 2-3 minutes.
8. Flip the cakes and cook until golden brown on the other side, about 2-3 more minutes.
9. Repeat with remaining batter, greasing the griddle as needed.
10. Serve hot. Makes approximately 8 servings.
